The '''''Endeavor''''' was a [[MC80 Liberty Type Heavy Star Cruiser|MC80 ''Liberty'' type]] [[Mon Calamari Star Cruiser/Legends|Mon Calamari Star Cruiser]] in service to the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Empire at War]]''
*''[[Star Wars: Empire at War: Forces of Corruption]]''
*[[Star Wars: Rebellion (video game)|''Star Wars: Rebellion'']] {{1st}}
